seoTitle: Russell Lea vs Rutherford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Russell Lea and Rutherford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Russell Lea vs Rutherford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Russell Lea and Rutherford.
heading: Russell Lea vs Rutherford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Russell Lea, New South Wales and Rutherford, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rutherford has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Russell Lea (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Russell Lea or Rutherford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Russell Lea has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Rutherford scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Russell Lea scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Rutherford scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Russell Lea or Rutherford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rutherford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
